_doc: Configuration for bonk-rl-env: an RL training environment for bonk.io-like physics games

server._doc_server: Controls the server process, network binding, and lifecycle
server._doc_port: ZMQ ROUTER bind port. Type: int. Range: 1-65535. Default: 5555. Env: PORT. CLI: --port
server._doc_bindAddress: Network interface to bind ZMQ socket. Type: string. Default: 127.0.0.1. Env: BIND_ADDRESS. CLI: --bind-address
server._doc_zmqBacklog: Max pending ZMQ connections in queue. Type: int. Range: 1+. Default: 100. Env: ZMQ_BACKLOG. CLI: --zmq-backlog
server._doc_maxRuntimeSeconds: Auto-shutdown after N seconds; 0 disables. Type: int. Range: 0+. Default: 0. Env: MAX_RUNTIME_SECONDS. CLI: --max-runtime-seconds
server._doc_shutdownTimeoutMs: Graceful shutdown timeout before force kill. Type: int. Range: 0+. Default: 10000. Env: SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS. CLI: --shutdown-timeout-ms

physics._doc_physics: Box2D physics engine parameters for deterministic simulation
physics._doc_ticksPerSecond: Fixed physics update rate. Type: int. Range: 1-240. Default: 30. Env: TICKS_PER_SECOND. CLI: --ticks-per-second
physics._doc_solverIterations: Constraint solver iterations per tick. Type: int. Range: 1-64. Default: 5. Env: SOLVER_ITERATIONS. CLI: --solver-iterations
physics._doc_scale: Pixels-per-meter conversion factor. Type: float. Range: 0.1+. Default: 30.0. Env: PHYSICS_SCALE. CLI: --scale
physics._doc_gravityX: Horizontal gravity component. Type: float. Default: 0.0. Env: GRAVITY_X. CLI: --gravity-x
physics._doc_gravityY: Vertical gravity component (positive = down). Type: float. Default: 10.0. Env: GRAVITY_Y. CLI: --gravity-y
physics._doc_enableSleeping: Allow inactive bodies to sleep for performance. Type: bool. Default: true. Env: ENABLE_SLEEPING. CLI: --enable-sleeping
physics._doc_worldAabbExtent: Half-extent of world AABB boundary. Type: float. Range: 100+. Default: 1000.0. Env: WORLD_AABB_EXTENT. CLI: --world-aabb-extent

player._doc_player: Player body shape, material, and movement properties
player._doc_radius: Player circle collision radius in meters. Type: float. Range: 0.01+. Default: 0.5. Env: PLAYER_RADIUS. CLI: --player-radius
player._doc_density: Player body density for mass calculation. Type: float. Range: 0.01+. Default: 1.0. Env: PLAYER_DENSITY. CLI: --player-density
player._doc_friction: Surface friction coefficient. Type: float. Range: 0.0-1.0. Default: 0.3. Env: PLAYER_FRICTION. CLI: --player-friction
player._doc_restitution: Bounciness on collision. Type: float. Range: 0.0-1.0. Default: 0.5. Env: PLAYER_RESTITUTION. CLI: --player-restitution
player._doc_moveForce: Applied force for horizontal movement. Type: float. Range: 0.01+. Default: 8.0. Env: PLAYER_MOVE_FORCE. CLI: --player-move-force
player._doc_heavyMassMultiplier: Mass scale when heavy mode is active. Type: float. Range: 1.0+. Default: 3.0. Env: PLAYER_HEAVY_MASS_MULTIPLIER. CLI: --player-heavy-mass-multiplier

grapple._doc_grapple: Grapple hook mechanics: range, joint physics, and slingshot impulse
grapple._doc_maxDistance: Maximum grapple reach in meters. Type: float. Range: 0.01+. Default: 10.0. Env: GRAPPLE_MAX_DISTANCE. CLI: --grapple-max-distance
grapple._doc_jointFrequencyHz: Grapple joint oscillation frequency. Type: float. Range: 0.01+. Default: 4.0. Env: GRAPPLE_JOINT_FREQUENCY_HZ. CLI: --grapple-joint-frequency-hz
grapple._doc_jointDampingRatio: Grapple joint damping ratio. Type: float. Range: 0.0-1.0. Default: 0.5. Env: GRAPPLE_JOINT_DAMPING_RATIO. CLI: --grapple-joint-damping-ratio
grapple._doc_slingshotImpulse: Impulse magnitude on grapple release. Type: float. Range: 0.0+. Default: 50.0. Env: GRAPPLE_SLINGSHOT_IMPULSE. CLI: --grapple-slingshot-impulse

arena._doc_arena: Arena boundary dimensions and out-of-bounds margin
arena._doc_defaultHalfWidth: Half-width of arena in meters. Type: float. Range: 1.0+. Default: 25.0. Env: ARENA_HALF_WIDTH. CLI: --arena-half-width
arena._doc_defaultHalfHeight: Half-height of arena in meters. Type: float. Range: 1.0+. Default: 20.0. Env: ARENA_HALF_HEIGHT. CLI: --arena-half-height
arena._doc_boundsMargin: Extra margin beyond arena bounds before out-of-bounds. Type: float. Range: 0.0+. Default: 5.0. Env: ARENA_BOUNDS_MARGIN. CLI: --arena-bounds-margin

environment._doc_environment: RL episode settings: opponents, episode length, randomness, and seed
environment._doc_numOpponents: Number of opponent bots per episode. Type: int. Range: 0-7. Default: 1. Env: NUM_OPPONENTS. CLI: --num-opponents
environment._doc_maxTicks: Max ticks per episode before truncation. Type: int. Range: 1+. Default: 900. Env: MAX_TICKS. CLI: --max-ticks
environment._doc_randomOpponent: Enable randomized opponent actions. Type: bool. Default: true. Env: RANDOM_OPPONENT. CLI: --random-opponent
environment._doc_randomOppMoveProb: Probability opponent moves each tick. Type: float. Range: 0.0-1.0. Default: 0.2. Env: RANDOM_OPP_MOVE_PROB. CLI: --random-opp-move-prob
environment._doc_randomOppUpProb: Probability opponent jumps when moving. Type: float. Range: 0.0-1.0. Default: 0.15. Env: RANDOM_OPP_UP_PROB. CLI: --random-opp-up-prob
environment._doc_randomOppDownProb: Probability opponent activates heavy mode. Type: float. Range: 0.0-1.0. Default: 0.1. Env: RANDOM_OPP_DOWN_PROB. CLI: --random-opp-down-prob
environment._doc_randomOppHeavyProb: Probability opponent uses heavy mode. Type: float. Range: 0.0-1.0. Default: 0.05. Env: RANDOM_OPP_HEAVY_PROB. CLI: --random-opp-heavy-prob
environment._doc_randomOppGrappleProb: Probability opponent fires grapple. Type: float. Range: 0.0-1.0. Default: 0.05. Env: RANDOM_OPP_GRAPPLE_PROB. CLI: --random-opp-grapple-prob
environment._doc_frameSkip: Number of physics ticks per observation. Type: int. Range: 1+. Default: 1. Env: FRAME_SKIP. CLI: --frame-skip
environment._doc_seed: RNG seed for reproducibility; 0 uses random seed. Type: int. Default: 0. Env: SEED. CLI: --seed
environment._doc_defaultMapPath: Path to default arena map JSON file. Type: string. Default: maps/bonk_WDB__No_Mapshake__716916.json. Env: DEFAULT_MAP_PATH. CLI: --default-map-path
environment._doc_aiPlayerId: Player slot index controlled by the RL agent. Type: int. Range: 0-7. Default: 0. Env: AI_PLAYER_ID. CLI: --ai-player-id

reward._doc_reward: RL reward shaping: kill, death, and per-tick time penalties
reward._doc_killReward: Reward for eliminating an opponent. Type: float. Default: 1.0. Env: KILL_REWARD. CLI: --kill-reward
reward._doc_deathPenalty: Penalty for being eliminated. Type: float. Default: -1.0. Env: DEATH_PENALTY. CLI: --death-penalty
reward._doc_timePenalty: Per-tick penalty to encourage efficiency. Type: float. Default: -0.001. Env: TIME_PENALTY. CLI: --time-penalty

workerPool._doc_workerPool: Multi-process worker pool for parallel environment stepping
workerPool._doc_numWorkers: Number of worker processes; 0 auto-detects CPU cores. Type: int. Range: 0+. Default: 0. Env: NUM_WORKERS. CLI: --num-workers
workerPool._doc_maxWorkers: Upper cap on worker count. Type: int. Range: 1+. Default: 8. Env: MAX_WORKERS. CLI: --max-workers
workerPool._doc_useSharedMemory: Use shared memory buffers for observation transfer. Type: bool. Default: true. Env: USE_SHARED_MEMORY. CLI: --use-shared-memory
workerPool._doc_ringBufferSize: Slots in the shared memory ring buffer. Type: int. Range: 2+. Default: 16. Env: RING_BUFFER_SIZE. CLI: --ring-buffer-size
workerPool._doc_messageTimeoutMs: Timeout for inter-process message replies. Type: int. Range: 100+. Default: 30000. Env: MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_MS. CLI: --message-timeout-ms
workerPool._doc_stepTimeoutMs: Timeout for a single environment step. Type: int. Range: 100+. Default: 5000. Env: STEP_TIMEOUT_MS. CLI: --step-timeout-ms

ipc._doc_ipc: ZeroMQ socket tuning and serialization options
ipc._doc_socketType: ZMQ socket pattern. Type: string. Enum: ROUTER, DEALER, REP, REQ. Default: ROUTER. Env: SOCKET_TYPE. CLI: --socket-type
ipc._doc_serialization: Message wire format. Type: string. Enum: json, msgpack. Default: json. Env: SERIALIZATION. CLI: --serialization
ipc._doc_tcpKeepalive: TCP keepalive toggle (0=off, 1=on). Type: int. Enum: 0, 1. Default: 0. Env: TCP_KEEPALIVE. CLI: --tcp-keepalive
ipc._doc_sndHwm: Outbound message high-water mark. Type: int. Range: 0+. Default: 1000. Env: SND_HWM. CLI: --snd-hwm
ipc._doc_rcvHwm: Inbound message high-water mark. Type: int. Range: 0+. Default: 1000. Env: RCV_HWM. CLI: --rcv-hwm
ipc._doc_lingerMs: Socket linger time after close. Type: int. Range: 0+. Default: 1000. Env: LINGER_MS. CLI: --linger-ms

telemetry._doc_telemetry: Performance profiling, debug tracing, and dashboard reporting
telemetry._doc_enabled: Master toggle for telemetry collection. Type: bool. Default: false. Env: TELEMETRY_ENABLED. CLI: --telemetry-enabled
telemetry._doc_profileLevel: Profiling granularity. Type: string. Enum: none, basic, standard, detailed. Default: standard. Env: PROFILE_LEVEL. CLI: --profile-level
telemetry._doc_debugLevel: Debug trace verbosity. Type: string. Enum: none, basic, detailed, verbose. Default: none. Env: DEBUG_LEVEL. CLI: --debug-level
telemetry._doc_outputFormat: Telemetry output destination. Type: string. Enum: console, json, prometheus. Default: console. Env: OUTPUT_FORMAT. CLI: --output-format
telemetry._doc_dashboardPort: HTTP port for telemetry dashboard. Type: int. Range: 1-65535. Default: 3001. Env: DASHBOARD_PORT. CLI: --dashboard-port
telemetry._doc_reportIntervalMs: Interval between telemetry reports. Type: int. Range: 100+. Default: 5000. Env: REPORT_INTERVAL_MS. CLI: --report-interval-ms
telemetry._doc_retentionDays: Days to retain telemetry data. Type: int. Range: 1+. Default: 7. Env: RETENTION_DAYS. CLI: --retention-days
telemetry._doc_hookPhysicsMethods: Instrument physics engine calls for profiling. Type: bool. Default: true. Env: HOOK_PHYSICS_METHODS. CLI: --hook-physics-methods
telemetry._doc_memoryRecordInterval: Interval for memory usage snapshots in ms. Type: int. Range: 100+. Default: 1000. Env: MEMORY_RECORD_INTERVAL. CLI: --memory-record-interval
telemetry._doc_workerSnapshotInterval: Interval for worker state snapshots in ms. Type: int. Range: 100+. Default: 5000. Env: WORKER_SNAPSHOT_INTERVAL. CLI: --worker-snapshot-interval

logging._doc_logging: Console log output format and verbosity
logging._doc_level: Minimum log level. Type: string. Enum: error, warn, info, debug, trace. Default: info. Env: LOG_LEVEL. CLI: --log-level
logging._doc_timestamps: Include ISO timestamps in log lines. Type: bool. Default: true. Env: LOG_TIMESTAMPS. CLI: --log-timestamps
logging._doc_colorize: ANSI color output in console logs. Type: bool. Default: true. Env: LOG_COLORIZE. CLI: --log-colorize

benchmark._doc_steps: Number of simulation steps per benchmark run. Type: int. Range: 1+. Default: 2000. Env: BENCH_STEPS. CLI: --bench-steps
benchmark._doc_warmupSteps: Warmup steps before timing begins. Type: int. Range: 0+. Default: 200. Env: BENCH_WARMUP_STEPS. CLI: --bench-warmup-steps
benchmark._doc_timeoutMs: Hard timeout for entire benchmark suite. Type: int. Range: 1000+. Default: 600000. Env: BENCH_TIMEOUT_MS. CLI: --bench-timeout-ms
benchmark._doc_scalingEnvCounts: Environment counts to test for linear scaling. Type: int[]. Default: [1,2,4,8,16]. Env: BENCH_SCALING_ENV_COUNTS. CLI: --bench-scaling-env-counts

test._doc_test: Test runner behavior and failure handling
test._doc_timeoutMs: Per-test timeout in milliseconds. Type: int. Range: 1000+. Default: 60000. Env: TEST_TIMEOUT_MS. CLI: --test-timeout-ms
test._doc_retryCount: Number of retries on test failure. Type: int. Range: 0+. Default: 0. Env: TEST_RETRY_COUNT. CLI: --test-retry-count
test._doc_bailOnFailure: Stop test suite on first failure. Type: bool. Default: false. Env: TEST_BAIL_ON_FAILURE. CLI: --test-bail-on-failure

python._doc_python: Python client connection and observation/action space parameters
python._doc_clientPort: ZMQ port the Python client connects to. Type: int. Range: 1-65535. Default: 5555. Env: CLIENT_PORT. CLI: --client-port
python._doc_numEnvs: Number of parallel environments the client expects. Type: int. Range: 1+. Default: 1. Env: NUM_ENVS. CLI: --num-envs
python._doc_connectionDelaySec: Delay before first step after connection. Type: float. Range: 0.0+. Default: 0.1. Env: CONNECTION_DELAY_SEC. CLI: --connection-delay-sec
python._doc_obsDim: Observation vector dimensionality. Type: int. Range: 1+. Default: 14. Env: OBS_DIM. CLI: --obs-dim
python._doc_actionSpaceSize: Total discrete action space cardinality. Type: int. Range: 1+. Default: 64. Env: ACTION_SPACE_SIZE. CLI: --action-space-size
